title: The Kirk Of Lamington.
content:
As cauld a wind as ever blew,
        As caulder kirk, and in't but few;
        As cauld a minister's e'er spak,
        Ye'se a' be het ere I come back.
meaning:
Robert Burns's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "The Kirk Of Lamington."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
